## Embeddable block

A narrow upper-floor room with a single tall window on the left wall.
Drafting table angled into the light. Walls papered with unfinished
maps. Rolled charts in a corner crock. Single hanging brass lamp,
unlit except after dark.

## Clauses

- Window on the LEFT — anchors the lighting source convention.
- Drafting table angled INTO the light — keeps the cartographer's hands
  in the brightest value.
